leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Compete with builders worldwide. Climb the ranks by earning XP, maintaining streaks, and unlocking achievements.

global.title: Global Leaderboard
global.description: All-time top learners across the platform

hero.title: Build on Solana.
hero.description: Interactive courses, hands-on challenges, and verifiable credentials. Master blockchain development the way real builders learn — by shipping code.

features.title: Designed for
features.description: Everything you need to go from beginner to proficient Solana developer, with tools and incentives that keep you moving forward.
features.interactiveCodingDesc: Write, test, and deploy Solana programs directly in your browser with instant feedback.
features.earnXpDesc: Gain experience points for every lesson, challenge, and course you complete.
features.credentialsDesc: Receive verifiable, soulbound credentials stored on Solana that prove your expertise.
features.expertContentDesc: Courses built by auditors, core contributors, and builders who ship on mainnet.
features.streaksDesc: Build learning habits with daily streaks, weekly goals, and milestone celebrations.
features.communityDesc: Join thousands of Solana builders, share progress, and compete on leaderboards.

featured.title: Featured courses
featured.description: Start here. Master the foundations with our most popular tracks.

paths.title: Structured learning paths
paths.description: Follow a curated sequence of courses to build expertise in a specific domain. No guessing what to learn next.
paths.coreDevDesc: Full path from Rust basics to deploying production programs on mainnet.
paths.auditorDesc: Learn to identify vulnerabilities and audit Solana programs professionally.
paths.fullStackDesc: End-to-end: on-chain programs, TypeScript SDK, React frontend, deployment.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse our catalog of 50+ courses organized by topic, difficulty, and career path.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Complete interactive lessons, solve coding challenges, and build real projects in-browser.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Collect experience points, maintain streaks, and unlock soulbound on-chain credentials.

testimonials.title: Built by builders, for builders
testimonials.description: Hear from developers who accelerated their Solana careers.

cta.title: Your Solana journey starts here
